title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and list models via Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node & browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama models; use Llama/Mistral in chains & agents.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (renamed to Open WebUI); chat, model management, RAG.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; simple fluent API and streaming support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Cross-platform TUI client for Ollama written in Rust; keyboard-driven chat.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Lightweight GitHub Copilot proxy that uses Ollama models for code completions.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Streamlit app for retrieval-augmented generation with Ollama embeddings & chat.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that answers queries using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-nvidia-rtx
summary: GitHub issue tracking NVIDIA RTX GPU performance tips & Docker images for Ollama.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Batteries-included docker-compose with Ollama, Open WebUI, Chroma, and RAG extras.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama supporting streaming chat, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate for Ollama with Tokio-based async client and strong typing.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app offering admin-configurable Ollama models and REST endpoints.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension to chat with Ollama models inside the editor sidebar.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators & embedders.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server that forwards channel messages to Ollama and replies.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated list of custom Modelfiles for Ollama (CodeLlama, SQLCoder, etc.).
